{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231952379B376C1C258ABBF6B44D"}"},"total":25540},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7455591440211755801","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"咦，居然看到一个大气的男主！别的求生文猪脚都是以小博大，以极小的物资换取极大或者稀缺的物资。第一次看到一个直接就给最高价来换取圣水。有魄力！不把别人当傻子。高智商女主+高武男主的搭配也很厉害，没有丑化或者弱化女性角色。小地图也很新颖。💯","text_exts":[{"e":81,"s":78,"text":"高智商","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774266757BBF6B44D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227455591440211755801%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227357660681379793982%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AB%98%E6%99%BA%E5%95%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735890378,"group_id":"7357660681379793982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N40ieyFSp0zf1qfonUt2StnjMelHtJXS8+J/OBTlze6C","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4334731265593642","user_name":"砸锅卖铁暗中讨饭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4334731265593642","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7357660681379793982","book_info":{"abstract":"实体书已签
【航海】【求生】【灾害】【打造船只】【天赋】【克苏鲁】【单女主】
全民穿越，杨逸作为玩家，被迫加入到全民航海求生游戏。
一些幸运儿拥有特殊船只。
比如武装到牙齿的钢铁雄心号。
比如乘风破浪，根本见不到影的疾风号。
比如拥有巨大撞角，一往无前的铁头号。
但杨逸，他的船叫梦魇号，是一艘幽灵船.....
含克系元素，主角不会过的很惬意，非异世界度假，非轻松文。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0816d5a564711261fe70eb67f4782249","author":"新买的桃子","author_id":"","book_id":"7357660681379793982","book_name":"恐怖大航海","book_short_name":"诡海之旅","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"65.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7357725071521088062","read_count":"657347","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2591917"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"1222","tags":"游戏体育,系统,穿越,求生,单女主,开局,克苏鲁,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2b72f653d2b45952dedeca34d11e8a76~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450757&x-signature=OpnIEZvF4f6rC%2BiorPzw8rpNJ4c%3D","tomato_book_st
